[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image is a close-up, side-by-side split portrait illustration of two stylized male faces with the text “KENAPA TUH” above and “KIRA” repeated below.

Main Subject:
Two overlapping illustrated faces fill most of the frame, one with a lighter blond hairstyle and one with a darker brown hairstyle, both shown in profile and facing toward the center; the eyes are drawn with dark eyeliner-like lines and the expressions are calm and slightly serious.

Setting:
The background is a simple, cartoon-like gradient with muted orange and green tones and no clear real-world setting; the lighting is flat and graphic, consistent with an illustrated poster style.

Visual Details:
The composition is a vertical split with the blond-haired face on the left and the brown-haired face on the right, separated by a central overlap where their faces partially blend; thick black linework outlines the features, shadows are indicated with flat darker shading, and both heads tilt slightly toward the center. The clothing collar at the lower right appears dark, blending into the illustrated style, while the left side includes a pale neck area and a light-toned background behind the hair. The overall color palette is warm yellows and oranges with muted greens and browns.

Visible Text:
KENAPA TUH
KIRA
KIRA

Practical Summary:
A stylized illustrated graphic shows two different male faces in a split, overlapping close-up. Bold, uppercase Indonesian text appears at the top and bottom of the image.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
